that's been rumored<Color=white> to be lurking
somewhere in Hyrule.

seen traveling with this beast. Look at
those tusks.<unk[5:0]> What a fearsome creature!

Quite a mystery, don't you think?

to these rumors.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]>这是<Color=red>未知生物的图画<Color=white>，
上面的生物据说就生活在海拉鲁的某处……<PageBreak>近些天里，各座驿站里都传开了。<PageBreak><unk[3:0:12]>说这生物身体巨大，长有獠牙……<unk[5:0]>
甚至还有传闻说是塞尔达公主带着它……
但这生物目前还是个谜，
没有人知道它的真实情况……<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>我要是还年轻，为了探明真相，一定会想自己去
各地的驿站游历一圈，寻一寻生物的足迹的。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]>這是某種<Color=red>未知生物的圖<Color=white>，
據說他就在海拉魯的某處……<PageBreak>這個話題最近傳遍了各個驛站呢。<PageBreak><unk[3:0:12]>那傢伙具有巨大身軀和獠牙……<unk[5:0]>
還有人說薩爾達公主將其帶在身邊…
目前無人知曉這個生物為何，
至今仍然是一個謎團……<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>若老夫還年輕的話，就能去各地的驛站
尋找生物的足跡探求真相了……

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]>Reports say this is a picture of a <Color=red>beast
that's been rumored <Color=white>to be lurking
somewhere in Hyrule.
It's been the talk of all the stables.


<unk[3:0:12]>They say that Princess Zelda herself was
seen traveling with this beast. Such
monstrous tusks! Truly fearsome.
But the truth is, nobody knows much at
all about this thing. It's a mystery.

<unk[3:0:10]>If I were younger, I'd hike to all the
stables to find out if there's any truth
to these rumors.
